texto: I thought it wasn’t winning or losing but how you played the game that matters.”
autor: “Just ask anyone who came in second place if that is true.
explicacao: Citação de “Just ask anyone who came in second place if that is true. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I thought it wasn’t winning or losing but how you played the game that matters.”” articula reflexao, kenneth-eade, thought em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
